understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place all selectable pieces onto all goal (+) tiles simultaneously. In this level, there were two selectable pieces (P and S) and two goals. I needed to position both pieces on the goals while managing limited steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece by 3-pixel grid steps. Pushing didn't seem present. Walls/blocked movements were discovered by trying. CLICK switches control to another selectable piece if given its exact position; it fails silently if blocked or position invalid. The step budget per level was tight, requiring efficient pathing. My repeated failed CLICK attempts show I struggled with coordinate precision or the other piece's location.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place all selectable pieces onto all goal (+) tiles simultaneously. In this level, there were two selectable pieces (P and S) and two goals. I needed to position both pieces on the goals while managing limited steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece by 3-pixel grid steps. Pushing didn't seem present. Walls/blocked movements were discovered by trying. CLICK switches control to another selectable piece if given its exact position; it fails silently if blocked or position invalid. The step budget per level was tight, requiring efficient pathing.
